name: Robert Kelly
blurb: He played Louis C.K.'s brother on the FX series Louie and co-hosts the SiriusXM show The Bonfire.
bio: Robert Kelly is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and podcast host from the Boston area, known by the nickname Kells Bells. He played Louis C.K.'s brother on the FX series Louie and co-hosts the SiriusXM show The Bonfire. He hosts the long-running podcast You Know What Dude and has released several stand-up specials, including Live at the Village Underground and Kill Box.

timeline.ev: Launches the You Know What Dude podcast and begins his run on Louie
Live at the Village Underground premieres on Comedy Central
Releases the special Kill Box, directed by Louis C.K.
Takes over hosting SiriusXM's The Bonfire and co-hosts The Regz

bits.yt_title: Robert Kelly: Kill Box | Teaching Your Kid
bits.yt_author: Robert Kelly's “YKWD” You Know What Dude
